mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orderstatus WHERE orderid = #{orderId} ORDER BY linenum
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orderstatus (orderid, linenum, timestamp, status) VALUES ( #{orderStatus.orderId}, (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(linenum), 0) + 1 FROM orderstatus WHERE orderid = #{orderStatus.orderId}), #{orderStatus.timestamp}, #{orderStatus.status} )

INSERT INTO orderstatus (orderid, linenum, timestamp, status) VALUES
(#{status.orderId}, #{status.lineNumber}, #{status.timestamp}, #{status.status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orderstatus WHERE orderid = #{orderId} ORDER BY linenum DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT orderid FROM orderstatus WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY orderid
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orderstatus WHERE timestamp >= #{startDate} AND timestamp <= #{endDate}
